hypotheses.name: Hub Gene Embedding Centrality
hypotheses.method: For 201 named genes with >=1 STRING edge (score>=0.4), compute mean L2 distance to layer centroid. Spearman rho(STRING_degree, -dist_to_centroid) per layer. Null: 500 permutations of degree labels.
hypotheses.result_value: rho=+0.225 at L10 (p=0.00135, null_p=0.000); monotonic increase L0(+0.009) to L10(+0.225)
hypotheses.next_action: Bootstrap CI per layer, biological anchor (TF enrichment in top-central genes), cross-model test if Geneformer embeddings available

hypotheses.name: PC1 T-cell vs APC Cell-type Axis
hypotheses.method: Curated T-cell markers (PRF1, LCK, IFNG, CD8A, JUN, JUNB n=6) and APC markers (HLA-A/B/C/DRA/DRB1, FOS, FOSB n=7). PCA per layer, AUROC and Spearman rho(PC1, +-1 label) for axis genes.
hypotheses.result_value: L11 AUROC=0.714 but T-cell and APC markers both cluster at PC1~+2.2 to +2.4 (no separation). Best AUROC=0.762 at L1, p=0.12 (not significant). Brainstormer JUN-top/FOS-bottom pattern not confirmed.
hypotheses.next_action: Retire PC1 T-cell/APC axis hypothesis. The 76.7% variance explained by PC1 at L11 means all genes collapse to PC1 extremum regardless of cell type.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: Both T-cell and APC marker genes collapse to same PC1 position at L11; no axis separation found at any layer with significance

hypotheses.name: kNN Graph Spectral Gap Across Layers
hypotheses.method: k=10 nearest neighbor graph on 209 named gene embeddings per layer. Normalized graph Laplacian eigenvalue spectrum. Spectral gap = Fiedler value (lambda_2). Trend: Spearman rho(layer, gap). Null: 100 permutations at L11.
hypotheses.result_value: rho=-0.993, p=1.3e-10; gap decreases from 0.1614 (L0) to 0.0361 (L11); entropy rho=-0.986 p=4.1e-9; null_p=0.190 (needs better null)
hypotheses.next_action: Add random-Gaussian null to confirm gap trend exceeds baseline. Identify the 2 connected components at L11. Test k-robustness (k=5,10,15,20).
